transcript: Speaker A: मैं स्कूल जा रही हूँ [I am going to school] Speaker B: I am going to school. Speaker A: आज मैं स्कूल जाकर Maths पढूँगी [Today, I will go to school and study Maths.] Speaker B: Today, I will go to school and study Maths. Speaker A: मेरे लंच में मेरी माँ ने tasty खाना डाला है [My mother has packed tasty food in my lunch.] Speaker B: My mother has packed tasty food in my lunch. Speaker A: वाह! तुम्हारी इंग्लिश तो बहुत अच्छी है। ये तुमने कहाँ से सीखी? [Wow! Your English is very good. Where did you learn this from?] Speaker B: वो मैंने MySivi ऐप से सीखी। [I learned that from the MySivi app.] Speaker A: MySivi ऐप? वो क्या है? [MySivi app? What is that?] Speaker B: इस ऐप में एक AI टीचर है, जो कि बिना जजमेंट के इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस करवाती है और कोई गलती हुई तो तुरंत करेक्ट भी कर देती है। [In this app, there is an AI teacher who helps practice English without judgment, and if there's any mistake, corrects it immediately.] Speaker A: वाह! पर ये ऐप तो महँगा होगा ना? [Wow! But this app must be expensive, right?] Speaker B: बिल्कुल नहीं! मैंने सिर्फ ₹1 में शुरू किया था, तो तुम भी कर सकती हो। [Not at all! I started for just ₹1, so you can too.] Speaker A: Wow amazing! फिर शुरू कैसे करूँ? [Wow amazing! Then how do I start?] Speaker B: Install बटन पे क्लिक करो, MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो, and अपनी 15 days इंग्लिश लर्निंग चैलेंज शुरू करो। [Click on the Install button, install the MySivi app, and start your 15 days English learning challenge.] Speaker C: Install now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: मैं स्कूल जा रही हूँ [I am going to school], I AM GOING TO SCHOOL, आज मैं स्कूल जाकर Maths पढूँगी [Today, I will go to school and study Maths], TODAY, I WILL GO TO SCHOOL AND STUDY MATHS, मेरे लंच में मेरी माँ ने tasty खाना डाला है [My mother has packed tasty food in my lunch], MY MOTHER HAS PACKED TASTY FOOD IN MY LUNCH, MySivi, Arya AI Teacher, MySivi Premium: 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1, Install Now
summary: An anime-style skit where a boy demonstrates his fluent English to a friend, attributing his skills to the MySivi app. He explains how the app's AI teacher corrects grammar mistakes instantly and mentions a ₹1 trial offer. The ad concludes with a call to action to install the app and start a 15-day learning challenge.
